Features.title: Our Exclusive Tours in Rio de Janeiro
Features.subtitle: Choose the perfect package for your trip and discover the beauties of Rio de Janeiro with licensed guides and personalized experiences.

package1.title: Essential Rio – 1 Day
package1.description: Visit Rio de Janeiro's main landmarks in a full day. Christ the Redeemer, Sugarloaf Mountain, iconic beaches, and historical sites, all with included transportation and a Cadastur-licensed guide.

package2.title: Complete Rio – 2 Days
package2.description: Explore the best of Rio de Janeiro in two intense days of guided tours. Combine visits to major tourist attractions with cultural, gastronomic, and exclusive activities.

package3.title: Rio Immersion – 3 Days
package3.description: Full immersion in Rio de Janeiro with three days of exclusive and personalized tours. Complete itinerary, private transportation, multilingual guidance, and premium experience.

Testimonials.title: Reviews and Testimonials
Testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from clients who discovered Rio de Janeiro with Rick Travel.

testimonial1.author: Camila Ferraz
testimonial1.text: Amazing experience! Impeccable service and very well-planned itinerary.
testimonial1.fullText: Amazing experience! Impeccable service and very well-planned itinerary. The guide was extremely professional and attentive, making the tour easy, safe, and enriching. I recommend it to anyone who wants to explore Rio with quality.

testimonial2.author: Lucas Hernanes
testimonial2.text: Excellent private tour, everything organized down to the smallest details.
testimonial2.fullText: Excellent private tour, everything organized down to the smallest details. The guide spoke fluent English, the transportation was comfortable, and the itinerary flexible. A memorable experience for the whole family.

testimonial3.author: Rafael Monteiro
testimonial3.text: Super organized and comfortable tour, worth every minute.
testimonial3.fullText: Super organized and comfortable tour, worth every minute. The itinerary was flexible, the guide extremely polite, and the transportation impeccable. We enjoyed Rio with peace of mind and safety. Highly recommend!

testimonial4.author: Mariana Lopes
testimonial4.text: Premium service from start to finish, sensational experience.
testimonial4.fullText: Premium service from start to finish, sensational experience. Rick Travel took care of every detail with great professionalism. The tour was exclusive, comfortable, and super well-planned. Undoubtedly the best way to explore Rio.

testimonial5.author: Danyela Viana
testimonial5.text: The helicopter tour was simply surreal!
testimonial5.fullText: The helicopter tour was simply surreal! The aerial view of Christ the Redeemer and Guanabara Bay is something I will never forget. Impeccable organization, safety, and professionalism.

testimonial6.author: Julia Cortez
testimonial6.text: Extremely rich cultural itinerary and very well explained.
testimonial6.fullText: Extremely rich cultural itinerary and very well explained. The guide demonstrated complete mastery of Rio's history, making the tour engaging and educational. Top-tier experience.

FAQs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQs.subtitle: Quick and clear answers to the main questions about our tours, bookings, and experiences in Rio de Janeiro.

q1.question: How long does it take to confirm the booking?
q1.answer: Booking confirmation happens within 24 hours after payment. For urgent bookings, we offer express confirmation within 2 hours. Just contact our team.

q2.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q2.answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, and American Express), Pix, PayPal, and bank transfers. For companies, we also provide invoicing.

q3.question: Can I change or cancel my booking?
q3.answer: Yes. Changes or cancellations can be made up to 48 hours before the tour. After this deadline, our team will evaluate each case according to the cancellation policy.

q4.question: Do you serve international tourists?
q4.answer: We serve tourists from all over the world. Our guides are Cadastur-licensed and speak Portuguese, English, and Spanish, ensuring a safe and personalized experience.

q5.question: What is the refund policy?
q5.answer: Refunds are guaranteed for cancellations made up to 48 hours before the tour. In cases of adverse weather, we offer free rescheduling.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Discover Rio with those who know every detail
hero.imageAlt: Rick Travel team in Rio de Janeiro

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Rick Travel was born from a passion for Rio de Janeiro and the desire to provide authentic experiences to our visitors. Founded by Ricardo, a certified guide with over 10 years of experience, our company started with a simple dream: to showcase Rio safely and memorably.
story.paragraph2: Our team consists of certified guides, passionate about Rio and committed to excellence. We work with inspected and insured vehicles, always prioritizing the safety and well-being of our clients.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Rick Travel
whyChoose.subtitle: Six reasons that make Rick Travel the best choice to discover Rio de Janeiro

personalized.title: Personalized Service
personalized.description: Itineraries adapted to your interests, pace, and preferences. Each client is unique to us.

certified.title: Cadastur Certified Guides
certified.description: All our guides are certified by the Ministry of Tourism, ensuring professionalism and knowledge.

security.title: Certified Safety
security.description: Inspected vehicles, updated insurance, and rigorous safety protocols on all tours.

local.title: Authentic Local Experience
local.description: Discover Rio beyond tourist spots. Explore the culture, gastronomy, and daily life of Rio.

multilingual.title: Complete Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Service in Portuguese, English, Spanish, and Swedish. Clear and fluent communication for everyone.

optimized.title: Optimized Routes
optimized.description: Make the most of your time in Rio with smart itineraries that eliminate queues and optimize transfers.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To offer safe, authentic, and memorable tourist experiences, connecting people to the culture and beauty of Rio de Janeiro.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a reference in receptive tourism in Rio, recognized for excellence in service and quality of itineraries.

security.title: Safety and Certification
